title: Galaxy A34 5G Awesome Graphite 256Gb Sm A346Ezkepkd
features: Smooth and bright, even in sunlight

Galaxy A34 5G's 1,000nits, Super AMOLED display ensures a clear view even when outside. For silky smooth viewing on the 6.6-inch awesome screen, refresh rates up to 120Hz breathe life into your content.
Framed in simple lines and a glastic finish, Galaxy A34 5G is available in fashionable yet timeless colorways including Awesome Lime, Awesome Silver, Awesome Violet and Awesome Graphite.
Get it done in a flash

Powered by an octa-core processor and connected in 5G, Galaxy A34 5G inspires your peak performance whether at work or play. Keep it breezy with room for more with a 6/8GB memory and 128/256GB storage options plus support for a microSD card up to 1TB.
With a 5,000mAh (typical) battery, Galaxy A34 5G is fueled for longer hours while optimizing the battery life based on your phone usage through Adaptive Battery.
